structure.unit: Warehouses, Cold Storage and Refrigerated Locker Plants

law.catch_line: Issue of receipt containing false statement
law.text: A warehouseman, or any officer, agent or servant of a warehouseman, who fraudulently issues or aids in fraudulently issuing a receipt for goods knowing that it contains any false statement, shall be guilty of a misdemeanor, and shall be punished as provided in § 18.2-12.
